name: EVPN (ELAN) SI -- EVPN High-Availability
jira_title: EVPN (ELAN) SI | EVPN Regression | EVPN High-Availability

prerequisites.show_command: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more
prerequisites.pass_criteria: At least 1 neighbor in Established state with PfxAccepted > 0
prerequisites.fix_via: Manual -- ensure BGP L2VPN EVPN neighbors are configured and peering
Manual -- configure EVPN instances under network-services

prerequisites.pass_criteria: At least 1 MAC entry (Local or BGP learned)
prerequisites.fix_via: Start traffic to populate MAC table

dnos_process_mapping._note: Maps Jira test step names to validated DNOS process names (container-prefixed)

ha_trigger_commands._note: All validated on RR-SA-2 2026-03-23. Process names MUST be container-prefixed (routing:bgpd NOT bgpd). NCC ID resolved at runtime from 'show system'.
ha_trigger_commands.bgp_restart: request system process restart ncc {active_ncc_id} routing-engine routing:bgpd
ha_trigger_commands.bgp_stop: request system process stop ncc {active_ncc_id} routing-engine routing:bgpd
ha_trigger_commands.fibmgrd_restart: request system process restart ncc {active_ncc_id} routing-engine routing:fibmgrd
ha_trigger_commands.rib_manager_restart: request system process restart ncc {active_ncc_id} routing-engine routing:rib_manager
ha_trigger_commands.neighbour_manager_restart: request system process restart ncc {active_ncc_id} routing-engine neighbour_manager

show_commands_validated._note: All validated via search_cli_docs against DNOS CLI documentation
show_commands_validated.show bgp l2vpn evpn summary: SHOW_COMMANDS line 6398 -- BGP L2VPN EVPN neighbor table
show_commands_validated.show evpn summary: SHOW_COMMANDS line 10564 -- Global EVPN parameters + instance list
show_commands_validated.show evpn mac-table: SHOW_COMMANDS line 10080 -- All MAC entries across EVPN instances
show_commands_validated.show evpn mac-table instance {name}: SHOW_COMMANDS line 10089 -- MAC entries for specific instance
show_commands_validated.show evpn arp-table: SHOW_COMMANDS line 9116 -- ARP entries in EVPN instances
show_commands_validated.show network-services evpn {name}: SHOW_COMMANDS line 27200 -- EVPN service config view
show_commands_validated.show system: System node table with NCC/NCP/NCF status

show_commands_corrections._note: Jira ticket uses syntax that does not exist in DNOS -- corrected here
show_commands_corrections.show evpn detail instance {name}: IS VALID (corrected 2026-03-20 via cmd search evpn on RR-SA-2 DNOS 26.2.0). Both 'show evpn instance' and 'show evpn detail instance' exist.
show_commands_corrections.show evpn mac-table evi {evi}: DOES NOT EXIST. Use: show evpn mac-table instance {name}
show_commands_corrections.show bgp l2vpn evpn route-type 2 mac {ma: TBD -- validate on device via ? completion

scenarios.name: BGP Graceful Restart
scenarios.description: Restart BGP process, verify GR behavior (routes stale, forwarding continues, routes refreshed after recovery)

setup.description: Ensure EVPN service with traffic flowing. Record PW/route state.

show_commands: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

trigger.ha_command: request system process restart ncc {active_ncc_id} routing-engine routing:bgpd

convergence_criteria.command: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

show_commands: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

pass_criteria: Routes marked stale during GR window, no PW teardown
Forwarding continues during GR window
Routes refreshed after recovery, stale cleared
Labels identical pre/post

verdict_layers.control_plane_bgp: All L2VPN EVPN neighbors re-establish with same PfxAccepted
verdict_layers.control_plane_evpn: EVPN instance state matches before snapshot
verdict_layers.datapath_mac: MAC table re-populated to pre-restart count
verdict_layers.traffic: Forwarding continued during GR window (if /SPIRENT active)
verdict_layers.traces: GR stale/refresh cycle logged, zero NOTIFICATION sent

scenarios.name: LLGR (Long-Lived Graceful Restart)
scenarios.description: Restart BGP, let GR timer expire to trigger LLGR. Verify routes transition to LLGR_STALE, forwarding continues, stale cleared after full recovery.

setup.description: Establish EVPN service. Note: LLGR timers must be configured on BGP neighbors.

show_commands: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

trigger.ha_command: request system process stop ncc {active_ncc_id} routing-engine routing:bgpd
trigger.hold_down_note: Device GR Restart=120s + Stalepath=30s + margin=30s. LLGR l2vpn-evpn enabled (stalepath=300s). Wait past GR into LLGR phase.
trigger.restart_command: request system process restart ncc {active_ncc_id} routing-engine routing:bgpd

convergence_criteria.command: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

show_commands: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

pass_criteria: Routes transition to LLGR_STALE state (not deleted)
Forwarding continues with stale routes
After full recovery, stale cleared

verdict_layers.control_plane_bgp: LLGR_STALE routes present during hold-down, cleared after recovery
verdict_layers.datapath_mac: MAC table preserved during LLGR window

scenarios.name: GR/LLGR Failure (Timer Expiry)
scenarios.description: Restart BGP, prevent recovery past GR+LLGR timers. Verify routes removed, PWs torn down, MACs flushed. Then bring BGP back for full reconvergence.

show_commands: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

trigger.ha_command: request system process stop ncc {active_ncc_id} routing-engine routing:bgpd
trigger.hold_down_note: Device GR Restart=120s + Stalepath=30s + LLGR=300s + margin=30s = 480s. Wait past ALL GR+LLGR timers.

mid_check.description: After timer expiry, verify cleanup BEFORE restarting bgpd
show_commands: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

restart.command: request system process restart ncc {active_ncc_id} routing-engine routing:bgpd

convergence_criteria.command: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

show_commands: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

pass_criteria: After timer expiry: routes removed, PWs torn down, MACs flushed
BUM flooding still works (fallback to flood for unknown destinations)
When BGP comes back: full reconvergence from scratch

verdict_layers.control_plane_bgp: Routes removed after timer expiry, full reconvergence after restart
verdict_layers.datapath_mac: MACs flushed after timer expiry, repopulated after reconvergence
verdict_layers.traffic: BUM flooding during cleanup, unicast restored after reconvergence

scenarios.name: Process Restart -- fib-manager (fibmgrd)
scenarios.description: Restart fib-manager, verify FIB reprogrammed, PW state recovered, labels correct, traffic resumes.

trigger.ha_command: request system process restart ncc {active_ncc_id} routing-engine routing:fibmgrd

pass_criteria: PW state recovered, labels correct in forwarding plane
Traffic resumes

verdict_layers.control_plane_fib: fibmgrd running, FIB entries match pre-restart

scenarios.name: Process Restart -- zebra (rib_manager)
scenarios.description: Restart rib_manager (zebra). Verify MAC/ARP tables cleared, relearned correctly from traffic, no stale entries.

trigger.ha_command: request system process restart ncc {active_ncc_id} routing-engine routing:rib_manager

pass_criteria: MAC and ARP tables cleared after restart
Relearned correctly from traffic/dataplane
No stale entries

verdict_layers.datapath_mac: MACs cleared then relearned from traffic

scenarios.name: Process Restart -- neighbor-manager
scenarios.description: Restart neighbour_manager. Verify neighbors rediscovered, BGP sessions re-established, EVPN state restored.

setup.description: Establish service with active BGP neighbors.

show_commands: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

trigger.ha_command: request system process restart ncc {active_ncc_id} routing-engine neighbour_manager

convergence_criteria.command: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

show_commands: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

pass_criteria: Neighbors rediscovered, BGP sessions re-established
EVPN state restored

verdict_layers.control_plane_evpn: EVPN instance state matches before snapshot

scenarios.name: MAC Recovery Post-Restart
scenarios.description: Learn MACs from AC and remote RT-2, restart BGP (or zebra), verify MAC table empty after restart, resume traffic, verify MACs relearned.

setup.description: Learn MACs from AC and remote (RT-2).

show_commands: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

trigger.ha_command: request system process restart ncc {active_ncc_id} routing-engine routing:bgpd

immediate_check.description: Verify MAC table empty immediately after restart
immediate_check.expected: MAC table empty or significantly reduced

convergence_criteria.command: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

pass_criteria: Table empty immediately after restart
MACs relearned from traffic (not preloaded from CP)
Unknown unicast flooded until MAC relearned

verdict_layers.datapath_mac: MAC table empty after restart, fully repopulated after recovery
verdict_layers.traffic: Unknown unicast flooded during relearn window, then normal forwarding

scenarios.name: NCC / RE Switchover
scenarios.description: Trigger NCC switchover, verify service continues on new active NCC with matching labels and relearned MACs.

setup.description: Record full service state (labels, MACs, PW status).

show_commands: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

trigger.reconnect_note: SSH sessions terminated. Reconnect after switchover (30-60s).

convergence_criteria.command: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

show_commands: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

pass_criteria: Service continues on new active NCC
Labels match pre-switchover
MACs relearned from traffic

verdict_layers.system: Switchover completed, new active NCC operational
verdict_layers.control_plane_bgp: All L2VPN EVPN sessions re-established on new active
verdict_layers.control_plane_evpn: EVPN instance state matches before snapshot

scenarios.name: MAC Move During Restart Window
scenarios.description: Restart BGP (GR active), during GR window move MAC from AC-1 to AC-2 via Spirent traffic shift. Verify mobility counter increments, no permanent blackhole, MAC reflects new location after recovery.

mac_move_config._design_ref: Confluence: EVPN ELAN SI MAC Handling Design, Section A.9 (HA Design for MAC) + B.12 (HA Behavior for IP/L2Neighbor). MAC mobility state (suppression, counters, is_move_to_pw) must survive HA events.

setup.description: Create dual ACs on DUT (same EVPN instance, different inner VLANs). Create Spirent L2 devices on each AC with same MAC. Start traffic on AC-1, verify MAC learned.

show_commands: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

trigger.ha_command: request system process restart ncc {active_ncc_id} routing-engine routing:bgpd

during_gr.description: During GR window, shift Spirent traffic from AC-1 VLAN to AC-2 VLAN (same MAC). This triggers a local-to-local MAC move in the datapath while the BGP control plane is restarting.
during_gr.note: Spirent stops stream on inner VLAN 102 (AC-1), starts stream on inner VLAN 103 (AC-2) with same source MAC. DUT datapath detects MAC move and updates forwarding entry.

convergence_criteria.command: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

show_commands: show bgp l2vpn evpn summary | no-more

pass_criteria: MAC learned on AC-1 before trigger, moved to AC-2 during GR window
Mobility counter incremented by at least 1
No permanent blackhole after recovery
MAC table reflects correct (new) location on AC-2 after GR completes
No stale entry pointing to old AC-1 location
No forbidden flags (F=frozen, D=dropped) on the moved MAC

verdict_layers.control_plane_bgp: BGP re-establishes, RT-2 routes reflect new MAC location on AC-2
verdict_layers.datapath_mobility: Mobility counter incremented (AC-1 -> AC-2 counted per design A.5)
verdict_layers.traffic: No permanent blackhole (traffic reaches new MAC location on AC-2)

device_timers_RR_SA_2._note: Discovered from 'show bgp l2vpn evpn neighbors 1.1.1.1 | no-more' and 'show config protocols bgp 123 graceful-restart | no-more'

evpn_name.description: EVPN instance name to test. Discovered from device via 'show evpn summary'.

active_ncc_id.description: Active NCC ID. Discovered from 'show system' at runtime.

test_mac.description: MAC address for SC09 MAC move test. Discovered from 'show evpn mac-table' at runtime.
